name: brigade
description: Coordinate a fleet of cheap parallel coding agents from any ticket source (Notion, ClickUp, Obsidian vault boards, or a local folder of markdown files). Groom, design-swag, and cook tickets in git worktrees with tier-selected cooks, adversarial inspection, and a mandatory analyst retro. Settings, agent roles, and prompt overrides cascade across global, team, and repo-local layers.
